subcodes.first_line: Blessed art thou in whatsoever world thou wert and shalt be. Praise be to God for thy love of the Beloved of the worlds and thy recognition of Him Who is the Purpose [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لک فی ای عالم کنت و تکونین الحمد لله بمحبت محبوب عالمیان و عرفانش که مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @purpose; goal of creation
